score_types.label: Advancement Track
score_types.description: Victory points from goods placed on advancement track (each good scored by slot value)

score_types.label: Pearls
score_types.description: Each pearl counts as your highest-value placed good on the advancement track

score_types.label: Buildings
score_types.description: 1 VP per building owned (starting house, houses, key houses, star houses, outposts)

score_types.label: Reputation Bonus
score_types.description: Points from reputation track position (1st: 5 VP, 2nd: 3 VP, 3rd: 2 VP) plus track position bonuses

score_types.label: Star Building Bonuses
score_types.description: Conditional VP from star building cards (e.g., 2 VP per potion, 1 VP per cave card)

score_types.label: Adventure Cards
score_types.description: End-game victory points from adventure card bonuses
